text:
was a new recruit for the Scout Regiment in the live-action film Attack on Titan. She was portrayed by .

Appearance

Lil was a young woman with black hair that passed her shoulders. She wore the standard Scout Regiment uniform, with a creme colored shirt beneath her jacket.

Personality

Lil was a nice person. She cared very much for her comrades and her lover, Fukushi, the two planning on getting married after returning to the Walls. After his death, Lil wanted to avenge him and did so by lighting off the rest of the explosives and diving headfirst into the Titans, sacrificing herself.

Story

Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi

Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 1

Lil and her boyfriend Fukushi are among the many civilians who join the Scout Regiment because they can not find jobs. On the night before their mission to repair the breach in the outer Wall, Jean and Eren get into a fight, and in his anger Jean claims that the other recruits will all die soon, agitating Lil and necessitating that Fukushi calm her down.

During their trip to Omotemachi, the scouts are forced to stop and survey the area when they hear movement nearby. The noise is discovered to simply be some nearby cattle, but before they can reenter their vehicles and depart, they soldiers are ambushed by Titans. The recruits are forced to proceed to Omotemachi on foot, only making the trek safely with the help of Shikishima and his squad.

During the night, Lil and Fukushi hide in a building to make out, but are interrupted by the arrival of Titans. Fukushi is quickly killed in the ensuing battle. Lil tries to revive him with CPR, refusing to accept his death despite Souda's orders to leave him. Losing patience, Souda physically drags her away from the body, as Lil vows to kill all of the Titans in retribution.

During the battle a thief steals one of the Scouts' vehicles stocked with explosives. As the thief flees, Lil boards the vehicle and lights its explosives on fire, kicking the man out of the driver seat when she reaches the cab. Though the man tries to regain control, Lil manages to kick him out of the cab and proceeds to drive the vehicle into a mass of nearby Titans, killing herself in an attempt to hurt them.

Relationships

Fukushi - Lil was in love with Fukushi and was totally devoted to him. When he was bitten in half, she was devastated and avenged his death by diving headfirst into the Titans with explosives.

People Killed

Herself (Self-sacrifice)

Trivia

Lil functioned as a replacement for Hanna, with both having similar roles.
In the novelization of the films, it is revealed that, when she was young, Lil's father taught her a number of martial arts techniques, including moves he invented himself. This means that Lil could also serve as the live-action counterpart of Annie Leonhart, who received similar training from her father.
